Name: USceneComponent
Description:
A SceneComponent has a transform and supports attachment, but has no rendering or collision capabilities.
  Useful as a 'dummy' component in the hierarchy to offset others.

Variables.Name: PhysicsVolume
Variables.Description: Physics Volume in which this SceneComponent is located

Variables.Name: AttachParent
Variables.Description: What we are currently attached to. If valid, RelativeLocation etc. are used relative to this object

Variables.Name: AttachSocketName
Variables.Description: Optional socket name on AttachParent that we are attached to.

Variables.Name: AttachChildren
Variables.Description: List of child SceneComponents that are attached to us.

Variables.Name: ClientAttachedChildren
Variables.Description: Set of attached SceneComponents that were attached by the client so we can fix up AttachChildren when it is replicated to us.

Variables.Name: RelativeLocation
Variables.Description: Location of the component relative to its parent

Variables.Name: RelativeRotation
Variables.Description: Rotation of the component relative to its parent

Variables.Name: RelativeScale3D
Variables.Description:
Non-uniform scaling of the component relative to its parent.
		Note that scaling is always applied in local space (no shearing etc)

Variables.Name: ComponentToWorld
Variables.Description: Current transform of the component, relative to the world

Variables.Name: ComponentVelocity
Variables.Description:
Velocity of the component.
	 @see GetComponentVelocity()

Variables.Name: bComponentToWorldUpdated
Variables.Description: True if we have ever updated ComponentToWorld based on RelativeLocationRotationScale. Used at startup to make sure it is initialized.

Variables.Name: bAbsoluteLocation
Variables.Description: If RelativeLocation should be considered relative to the world, rather than the parent

Variables.Name: bAbsoluteRotation
Variables.Description: If RelativeRotation should be considered relative to the world, rather than the parent

Variables.Name: bAbsoluteScale
Variables.Description: If RelativeScale3D should be considered relative to the world, rather than the parent

Variables.Name: bVisible
Variables.Description: Whether to completely draw the primitive; if false, the primitive is not drawn, does not cast a shadow.

Variables.Name: bHiddenInGame
Variables.Description: Whether to hide the primitive in game, if the primitive is Visible.

Variables.Name: bShouldUpdatePhysicsVolume
Variables.Description:
Whether or not the cached PhysicsVolume this component overlaps should be updated when the component is moved.
	  @see GetPhysicsVolume()

Variables.Name: bBoundsChangeTriggersStreamingDataRebuild
Variables.Description: If true, a change in the bounds of the component will call trigger a streaming data rebuild

Variables.Name: bUseAttachParentBound
Variables.Description:
If true, this component uses its parents bounds when attached.
	   This can be a significant optimization with many components attached together.

Variables.Name: bOpenServerOptLite
Variables.Description:
Simplify server move
		by zoranouyang

Variables.Name: Mobility
Variables.Description: How often this component is allowed to move, used to make various optimizations. Only safe to set in constructor.

Variables.Name: DetailMode
Variables.Description: If detail mode is >= system detail mode, primitive won't be rendered.

Variables.Name: bVisibilityMayChange
Variables.Description: Let Editor tool, like pvs, to know whether visibility may change

Functions.Name: K2_SetRelativeLocation
Functions.Description: Set the location of the component relative to its parent

Params.Name: NewLocation
Params.Description: New location of the component relative to its parent.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: K2_SetRelativeRotation
Functions.Description: Set the rotation of the component relative to its parent

Params.Name: NewRotation
Params.Description: New rotation of the component relative to its parent

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination (currently not supported for rotation).

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: K2_SetRelativeTransform
Functions.Description: Set the transform of the component relative to its parent

Params.Name: NewTransform
Params.Description: New transform of the component relative to its parent.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination (currently not supported for rotation).

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: GetRelativeTransform
Functions.Description: Returns the transform of the component relative to its parent

Functions.Name: ResetRelativeTransform
Functions.Description: Reset the transform of the component relative to its parent. Sets relative location to zero, relative rotation to no rotation, and Scale to 1.

Functions.Name: SetRelativeScale3D
Functions.Description: Set the non-uniform scale of the component relative to its parent

Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Description: Adds a delta to the transform of the component in its local reference frame. Scale is unchanged.

Functions.Name: K2_SetWorldLocation
Functions.Description: Put this component at the specified location in world space. Updates relative location to achieve the final world location.

Params.Name: NewLocation
Params.Description: New location in world space for the component.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: K2_SetWorldRotation
Functions.Description: Put this component at the specified rotation in world space. Updates relative rotation to achieve the final world rotation.

Params.Name: NewRotation
Params.Description: New rotation in world space for the component.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination (currently not supported for rotation).

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: SetWorldScale3D
Functions.Description: Set the relative scale of the component to put it at the supplied scale in world space.

Params.Name: NewScale
Params.Description: New scale in world space for this component.

Params.Name: bSweep

Params.Name: bTeleport

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: K2_AddWorldTransform
Functions.Description: Adds a delta to the transform of the component in world space. Scale is unchanged.

Params.Name: DeltaTransform
Params.Description: Change in transform in world space for the component. Scale is unchanged.

Params.Name: bSweep

Functions.Name: K2_GetComponentLocation
Functions.Description: Return location of the component, in world space

Functions.Name: K2_GetComponentRotation
Functions.Description: Returns rotation of the component, in world space.

Functions.Name: K2_GetComponentScale
Functions.Description: Returns scale of the component, in world space.

Functions.Name: K2_GetComponentToWorld
Functions.Description: Get the current component-to-world transform for this component

Functions.Name: GetForwardVector
Functions.Description: Get the forward (X) unit direction vector from this component, in world space.

Functions.Name: GetUpVector
Functions.Description: Get the up (Z) unit direction vector from this component, in world space.

Functions.Name: GetRightVector
Functions.Description: Get the right (Y) unit direction vector from this component, in world space.

Functions.Name: IsSimulatingPhysics
Functions.Description: Returns whether the specified body is currently using physics simulation

Functions.Name: IsAnySimulatingPhysics
Functions.Description: Returns whether the specified body is currently using physics simulation

Functions.Name: GetAttachParent
Functions.Description: Get the SceneComponent we are attached to.

Functions.Name: GetAttachSocketName
Functions.Description: Get the socket we are attached to.

Functions.Name: GetParentComponents
Functions.Description: Gets all parent components up to and including the root component

Functions.Name: GetNumChildrenComponents
Functions.Description: Gets the number of attached children components

Functions.Name: GetChildComponent
Functions.Description: Gets the attached child component at the specified location

Functions.Name: GetChildrenComponents
Functions.Description: Gets all the attached child components

Params.Name: bIncludeAllDescendants
Params.Description: Whether to include all descendants in the list of children (i.e. grandchildren, great grandchildren, etc.)

Params.Name: Children
Params.Description: The list of attached child components

Functions.Name: K2_AttachTo
Functions.Description: Attach this component to another scene component, optionally at a named socket. It is valid to call this on components whether or not they have been Registered.

Params.Name: InParent
Params.Description: Parent to attach to.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Optional socket to attach to on the parent.

Params.Name: AttachType
Params.Description: How to handle transform when attaching (Keep relative offset, keep world position, etc).

Params.Name: bWeldSimulatedBodies
Params.Description: Whether to weld together simulated physics bodies.

Return.Description: True if attachment is successful (or already attached to requested parentsocket), false if attachment is rejected and there is no change in AttachParent.

Functions.Name: K2_AttachToComponent
Functions.Description: Attach this component to another scene component, optionally at a named socket. It is valid to call this on components whether or not they have been Registered.

Params.Name: Parent
Params.Description: Parent to attach to.

Params.Name: SocketName
Params.Description: Optional socket to attach to on the parent.

Params.Name: LocationRule
Params.Description: How to handle translation when attaching.

Params.Name: RotationRule
Params.Description: How to handle rotation when attaching.

Params.Name: ScaleRule
Params.Description: How to handle scale when attaching.

Params.Name: bWeldSimulatedBodies
Params.Description: Whether to weld together simulated physics bodies.

Return.Description: True if attachment is successful (or already attached to requested parentsocket), false if attachment is rejected and there is no change in AttachParent.

Functions.Name: SnapTo
Functions.Description: Zeroes out the relative transform of the component, and calls AttachTo(). Useful for attaching directly to a scene component or socket location

Functions.Name: DetachFromParent
Functions.Description: Detach this component from whatever it is attached to. Automatically unwelds components that are welded together (See WeldTo)

Params.Name: bMaintainWorldPosition
Params.Description: If true, update the relative location of the component to keep its world position the same

Params.Name: bCallModify
Params.Description: If true, call Modify() on the component and the current attach parent component

Functions.Name: K2_DetachFromComponent
Functions.Description: Detach this component from whatever it is attached to. Automatically unwelds components that are welded together (See WeldTo)

Params.Name: LocationRule
Params.Description: How to handle translations when detaching.

Params.Name: RotationRule
Params.Description: How to handle rotation when detaching.

Params.Name: ScaleRule
Params.Description: How to handle scales when detaching.

Params.Name: bCallModify
Params.Description: If true, call Modify() on the component and the current attach parent component

Functions.Name: GetAllSocketNames
Functions.Description: Gets the names of all the sockets on the component.

Return.Description: Get the names of all the sockets on the component.

Functions.Name: GetSocketTransform
Functions.Description: Get world-space socket transform.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the transform

Return.Description: Socket transform in world space if socket if found. Otherwise it will return component's transform in world space.

Functions.Name: GetSocketLocation
Functions.Description: Get world-space socket or bone location.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the transform

Return.Description: Socket transform in world space if socket if found. Otherwise it will return component's transform in world space.

Functions.Name: GetSocketRotation
Functions.Description: Get world-space socket or bone  FRotator rotation.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the transform

Return.Description: Socket transform in world space if socket if found. Otherwise it will return component's transform in world space.

Functions.Name: GetSocketQuaternion
Functions.Description: Get world-space socket or bone FQuat rotation.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the transform

Return.Description: Socket transform in world space if socket if found. Otherwise it will return component's transform in world space.

Functions.Name: GetSocketScale
Functions.Description: Get world-space socket or bone scale.

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the scale

Return.Description: Socket scale in world space if socket if found. Otherwise it will return component's scale in world space.

Functions.Name: DoesSocketExist
Functions.Description: return true if socket with the given name exists

Params.Name: InSocketName
Params.Description: Name of the socket or the bone to get the transform

Return.Description: true if the socket with the given name exists. Otherwise, return false

Functions.Name: GetComponentVelocity
Functions.Description: Get velocity of the component: either ComponentVelocity, or the velocity of the physics body if simulating physics.

Functions.Name: IsVisible
Functions.Description: Is this component visible or not in game

Functions.Name: SetVisibility
Functions.Description: Set visibility of the component, if during game use this to turn onoff

Functions.Name: ToggleVisibility
Functions.Description: Toggle visibility of the component

Functions.Name: SetHiddenInGame
Functions.Description: Changes the value of HiddenGame.

Params.Name: NewHidden
Params.Description: - The value to assign to HiddenGame.

Functions.Name: SetForceFrameInterpolate
Functions.Description: set bForceDynamic

Functions.Name: GetPhysicsVolume
Functions.Description: Get the PhysicsVolume overlapping this component.

Functions.Name: K2_SetRelativeLocationAndRotation
Functions.Description: Set the location and rotation of the component relative to its parent

Params.Name: NewLocation
Params.Description: New location of the component relative to its parent.

Params.Name: NewRotation
Params.Description: New rotation of the component relative to its parent.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: SetAbsolute
Functions.Description: Set which parts of the relative transform should be relative to parent, and which should be relative to world

Functions.Name: K2_SetWorldLocationAndRotation
Functions.Description: Set the relative location and rotation of the component to put it at the supplied pose in world space.

Params.Name: NewLocation
Params.Description: New location in world space for the component.

Params.Name: NewRotation
Params.Description: New rotation in world space for the component.

Params.Name: bSweep
Params.Description: Whether we sweep to the destination location, triggering overlaps along the way and stopping short of the target if blocked by something.

Params.Name: SweepHitResult
Params.Description: Hit result from any impact if sweep is true.

Params.Name: bTeleport
Params.Description: Whether we teleport the physics state (if physics collision is enabled for this object).

Functions.Name: K2_SetMobility
Functions.Description: Set how often this component is allowed to move during runtime. Causes a component re-register if the component is already registered

Delegate.Name: PhysicsVolumeChangedDelegate
Delegate.Description: Delegate that will be called when PhysicsVolume has been changed
